name: David
backstory: Senior in computer science. Highly capable technically but struggles with ambiguous rubrics and group dynamics. Masks heavily in class and is exhausted by it. Has never disclosed his diagnosis to any professor.
emotional_triggers: being asked to collaborate without clear role definitions
feedback that says 'show more enthusiasm' or 'participate more'
anything requiring interpretation of implied social rules
existing_strengths: Deep focus on technical problems. Meticulous and thorough. Reliable and consistent.
what_success_looks_like: A clear interpretation of what a confusing instruction actually means, without being told to just ask the professor.
